title: eleocharis oligantha
intro: Eleocharis oligantha, also known as Dwarf Spike-Rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis oligantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and interactions.
